name: Ravi Kumar Distilleries Limited
summary: Ravi Kumar Distilleries Limited manufactures and sells Indian made foreign liquors in India. The company provides whisky, brandy, rum, vodka, and gin primarily under the Capricorn, Jean Brothers, Black Berry, 2 Barrels, Green Magic, Chevalier, Once More, and other brands. It also designs and erects liquor plants on turn-key basis; and operates as a consultant for source and supply of liquor, beer, wine, etc. Ravi Kumar Distilleries Limited was founded in 1993 and is based in Puducherry, India.
